title: Exaggerated Soft Sculpture 3D Character AI
sourceTitle: Exaggerated Soft Sculpture 3D Character AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Complete single 3D editorial illustration of cartoonish courier character with round teal body and tiny determined head, frozen in dramatic mid-air delivery jump with one giant shoe kicked forward and arms stretched wide with comedic energy. Subject: cartoonish courier character with round teal body and tiny determined head has a tiny head, pudgy round body, extremely elongated limbs, oversized hands, big shoes, and soft chunky plush-sculpture proportions, wearing tiny cap, soft messenger pouch, oversized gloves, chunky sneakers, and a small rubber parcel icon. Scene: Clean white background with minimal staging, only a soft oval ground shadow and floating abstract graphic props around the character. Composition: Fixed single-character composition, not storyboard and not collage: mid-air off-balance jump, full body readable, abstract stars, squiggles, balls, cubes, icons, and symbols arranged around the motion path. Signature Elements: Preserved exaggerated soft sculpture 3d character source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Exaggerated editorial 3D illustration with matte soft rubber, fuzzy fabric, knitted surface texture, plasticine-like hand-crafted feel, fine fiber detail, subtle grain, and clean commercial rendering. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with global illumination, gentle shadows, low contrast, clean shape readability, and tactile material highlights. Materials: Matte soft rubber, fuzzy fabric, knitted texture, plasticine surface, paper-like props, and handcrafted fine fiber detail. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
